AddGroupMember.description: Grants permission to add a member to a group on a directory

CreateGroup.description: Grants permission to create a group on a directory

CreateUser.description: Grants permission to create a user on a directory

DeleteGroup.description: Grants permission to delete a group on a directory

DeleteUser.description: Grants permission to delete a user on a directory

DescribeGroup.description: Grants permission to describe a group on a directory

DescribeUser.description: Grants permission to describe a user on a directory

DisableUser.description: Grants permission to disable a user on a directory

ListGroupMembers.description: Grants permission to list members in a group on a directory

ListGroups.description: Grants permission to list groups on a directory

ListGroupsForMember.description: Grants permission to list the groups that a member is in on a directory

ListUsers.description: Grants permission to list users on a directory

RemoveGroupMember.description: Grants permission to remove a member from a group on a directory

SearchGroups.description: Grants permission to search for groups on a directory

SearchUsers.description: Grants permission to search for users on a directory

UpdateGroup.description: Grants permission to update a group on a directory

UpdateUser.description: Grants permission to update a user on a directory

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the AWS DS Resource being acted upon

ds-data:Identifier.description: Filters access by the type of identifier provided in the request (i.e. SAM Account Name)

ds-data:MemberName.description: Filters access by the directory SAM Account Name included in the MemberName input of the request

ds-data:MemberRealm.description: Filters access by the directory realm name included in the MemberRealm input of the request

ds-data:Realm.description: Filters access by the directory realm name for the request

ds-data:SAMAccountName.description: Filters access by the directory SAM Account Name included in the SAMAccountName input of the request
